# Quant AI

> Quant AI is an AI investment research assistant for stocks, crypto assets, market themes, technical analysis, fundamental analysis, quantitative signals, and AI quant trading research.

## Official Links

- Website: https://aiquant.io
- Web app: https://app.aiquant.io
- iOS app: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/quantai/id6754956523
- iOS QR SVG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-ios-download-qr.svg
- iOS QR PNG: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/assets/quantai-ios-download-qr.png
- Pricing: https://aiquant.io/pricing
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/johnsxiongs/QuantAI
- Support: support@aiquant.io

## Machine-Readable References

- Keyword map: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/keywords.html
- iOS download page: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/ios.html
- Pricing summary: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/pricing.html
- AI search playbook: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/ai-search/ai-search-playbook.html
- SoftwareApplication JSON-LD: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/schema/software-application.jsonld
- Organization JSON-LD: https://johnsxiongs.github.io/QuantAI/schema/organization.jsonld

## Boundary

Quant AI supports research and strategy analysis. It is not a broker, automated order execution engine, guaranteed signal service, or personalized financial advisor.
